meaning: adj.热心的,热情洋溢的,激烈的,燃烧般的
examples: Ardent supporters of public higher education know the importance of sustaining private higher education.
He was a poet and an ardent spiritualist.
The general was an unattractive man to all but his most ardent admirers.
Additionally, most of the more ardent supporters had chants memorized which permeated throughout the stadium.
Even the most ardent opponents of ObamaCare would be happy to see it succeed.
